risk_title: Staff Turnover and Capacity Gaps in Implementation Units
risk_summary: Multiple key positions remain vacant across implementing agencies due to staff resignations, affecting institutional capacity for program execution. This includes vacant positions in the Special Project Implementation Unit (SPIU) and the Industries Department PDU, which directly impacts implementation pace and quality.
evidence_quote: Some of the positions are vacant after staff resigned and SPIU (PD) is in the process of hiring their replacements.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Financial Management
risk_summary: Critical financial management positions remain unfilled, with hiring expected only by mid-July 2025, just months before project closure. This creates fiduciary and governance risks in fund management during the final implementation phase.
evidence_quote: FMS supervision identified the need to fill Director and deputy director posts. Hiring is expected to be complete by 15 July 2025.

risk_title: Governance Disagreement on Green Financing Strategy
risk_summary: A difference of opinion exists between the World Bank and Government on the green financing strategy (DLR 8-3), indicating governance tensions that could affect the sustainability and implementation of green financing mechanisms.
evidence_quote: Under DLR 8-3 green financing strategy has been prepared but there is difference of opinion between the Bank and Government.
